title: Rodolfo Damaggio
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Rodolfo Damaggio''' (born [[April 11]], [[1960s#1965|1965]]) is a [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] and concept artist who penciled the [[Dark Horse Comics]] adaptation of [[Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace (comic series)|''Star Wars Episode I — The Phantom Menace'']]. He later served as a concept artist for the films ''[[Star Wars: Episode VIII The Last Jedi|The Last Jedi]]'' and ''[[Star Wars: Episode IX The Rise of Skywalker|The Rise of Skywalker]]''.
